reason: Frontend (Flutter MVVM) entry point — pre-dev checklist for slices 1 & 2 (task-detail UI, push wiring)
View/Widget rules: colorScheme/AppDimens, Consumer<VM>, NavigationService, async+mounted, scrollbar pitfalls — core for the rich detail UI
provider + ChangeNotifier ViewModel conventions — assignee picker & in-app banner listener go through VMs
Dart null-safety, enum+wire, hand-written fromMap/toMap — touching Task/AppUser models and callable payloads
Cloud Functions entry point — pre-dev checklist for slices 3 & 4 (generateHandoff flow, issue-assignee sync)
HttpsError codes + best-effort trigger semantics — handoff generation must not block notify, issue sync is best-effort
Firestore doc/path + transaction conventions — writing handoffDoc, reading commits/discord/tasks
Structured logging convention for the new flow + trigger branches
Feature spans model→repo→VM→view and callable→handler→flow; keep wire contracts consistent (esp. Fake impls)
Reuse existing dailyIntel/discordSearch tools, assignTaskFlow patterns, githubClient helpers instead of duplicating
